title: vatica oblongifolia subsp. oblongifolia
intro: Vatica oblongifolia subsp. oblongifolia is a plant species within the family Dipterocarpaceae, commonly known as the Borneo ironwood. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Vatica oblongifolia subsp. oblongifolia include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a traditional remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Vatica oblongifolia subsp. oblongifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine practices in Southeast Asia.
